overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character in a glowing blue jacket through a sci-fi industrial facility. The character transitions from a narrow white corridor into a larger red-walled security area with neon signage and metal walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial maintenance corridor with white panel walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow corridor toward the exit doorway

entered.detail: white industrial panel walls with red trim running along the base
white industrial panel walls with red trim and wall-mounted fixtures
exposed red structural beams crossing the ceiling
grated metal flooring with geometric pattern
dark doorway leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed industrial corridor with white walls and red trim. The space is lit by artificial overhead lighting, with metal grating underfoot and exposed ceiling beams overhead. The character moves steadily toward a dark exit doorway at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: high security checkpoint with neon signage and upper catwalk

events.description: exits narrow corridor into large red-walled security room with industrial lighting
neon 'HIGH SECURITY' sign becomes visible on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the security area toward the far bulkhead doors

notable_agents.action: person sitting stationary on a chair against the red wall

entered.detail: dark red industrial wall panels with equipment mounted
vertical illuminated sign with red and blue neon text reading HIGH SECURITY
metal walkway with railings on the upper level
white and black security checkpoint counter
metal chairs arranged against the wall
large industrial double doors at the far end of the room
computer terminals and monitors behind glass

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a spacious high-security area with dramatic red walls and neon lighting. A prominent vertical neon sign illuminates the right side while an upper catwalk overlooks the space. The character walks past a security desk and a seated NPC toward large bulkhead doors at the far end of the industrial room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a sterile, enclosed corridor into a vast, red-lit security hub. It begins with the character walking through a narrow industrial hallway defined by white walls, red trim, and exposed ceiling beams over metal grating. As the character moves steadily forward, the confined space gives way to a dark exit doorway that opens into a spacious high-security area. The environment then shifts dramatically to a room with towering red walls and glowing neon signage, where the camera follows the character past a security desk and a seated NPC. Finally, the movement continues across the industrial floor toward large bulkhead doors at the far end of the chamber.
